plan_overview: Remove marker locking/mutability so editing behaves predictably (normal cursor/delete/cut/paste), and simplify editor mode selection to three explicit modes: regular (formatted, markers hidden), usfm (markers visible), plain (hands-off, markers visible). Correctness is maintained via conservative document-structure guardrails, lint feedback, and undo/redo rather than prevention.
technical_context: Current behavior is derived from a settings matrix (mode + markersViewState + markersMutableState) and enforced via USFMTextNode isMutable + a lockImmutableMarkers input interception layer. This refactor deletes those concepts and replaces them with a single project.appSettings.editorMode field. It also scopes maintainDocumentStructure into Tier A safety (all modes) vs Tier B correctness assists (regular/usfm only).

tasks.description: Introduce appSettings.editorMode (regular|usfm|plain), remove old mode/markers* settings, and default to regular.
steps: Update settings/project appSettings types to remove mode/markersViewState/markersMutableState and add editorMode.
Set default editorMode to 'regular' wherever defaults are defined.
Update all callsites reading appSettings.mode/markers* to use editorMode.
Remove DOM dataset wiring that encodes marker view/mutability state (or replace with editorMode-derived flags if still needed for CSS/plugins).
Update any tests that construct Settings/appSettings objects to include editorMode only.

tasks.description: Update the Editor Mode toggle UI to control editorMode = regular|usfm|plain (same location, no extra toggles).
steps: Replace the current derived-value logic in src/app/ui/components/blocks/ProjectSettings/EditorModeToggle.tsx with a direct mapping to editorMode.
Rename the 'raw' option label to 'Plain' and ensure the value keys match editorMode.
Update any tooltips/help text to match the new semantics (regular hides markers, usfm/plain show markers).
Remove references to actions.toggleToSourceMode/adjustWysiwygMode for mode switching if they become obsolete; otherwise adapt those actions to set editorMode.

tasks.description: Remove token locking/mutability from USFMTextNode and serialized node model.
steps: Delete TOKENS_TO_LOCK_FROM_EDITING from src/app/data/editor.ts and remove all imports/uses.
Remove isMutable state from src/app/domain/editor/nodes/USFMTextNode.ts (state, getters/setters, remove/canInsert* gates, type guards like $isLockedUSFMTextNode).
Remove serialized isMutable from createSerializedUSFMTextNode and any serialized helpers/adjusters that manipulate it.
Update node (de)serialization code and tests to stop expecting isMutable.
Update any code paths that used 'locked' semantics (e.g., traversal helpers) to either be generic or be removed.

tasks.description: Delete the lockImmutableMarkers input interception layer and rely on normal Lexical editing semantics.
steps: Delete src/app/domain/editor/listeners/lockImmutableMarkers.ts.
Remove registrations/imports from src/app/domain/editor/hooks/useEditorInput.ts.
Remove any leftover code that assumes copy/cut/paste/type are custom-handled for locked markers.
Verify Backspace/Delete/Cut/Paste behavior is now default across marker boundaries.

tasks.description: Implement guardrails split: Tier A safety (all modes) vs Tier B correctness assists (regular/usfm only).
steps: Refactor src/app/domain/editor/listeners/maintainDocumentStructure.ts into two callable paths (or two modules): a safety pass and a correctness pass.
Wire Tier A to run in all modes (regular/usfm/plain).
Wire Tier B to run only when editorMode is regular or usfm.
Ensure Tier B fixes are conservative to avoid cursor jank (small, local repairs only).
Add unit tests around a few known 'stranded marker' cases ensuring: (a) corrected in regular/usfm, (b) not auto-corrected in plain.

tasks.description: Make marker visibility purely mode-driven: regular hides markers; usfm/plain show markers.
steps: Remove markerViewState-based branching in styling/plugins and replace with editorMode checks.
Update any CSS/data-attributes that depended on data-marker-view-state to be derived from editorMode.
Ensure formatting consequences are visible in regular when markers are deleted (indent/para spacing changes).
Verify usfm/plain always render markers visibly.

tasks.description: Regression tests for lockless editing behavior.
steps: Add/adjust integration tests to ensure editing across markers (delete/cut/paste) does not throw and updates content.
Add a test that plain mode does not run Tier B correctness repairs.
Update or remove tests that assume isMutable / locked marker behavior.
